raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies the delta with prior work (e.g., ScaNN, DiskANN) but does not map against multiple works to identify sharp vs rhetorical deltas.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation and flags missing key works with bibliographic precision (e.g., HNSW).",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., the contribution paragraph's dual claim).",
    "RX.3": "The output is mostly within scope with minor drifts (e.g., the taxonomy inconsistency).",
    "RX.4": "The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (e.g., the ScaNN misclassification).",
    "RX.5": "The agent does not provide any annotation of sources and reasons for non-cosmetic changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.85,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies the delta with prior work (e.g., ScaNN, DiskANN) but does not map against multiple works to identify sharp vs rhetorical deltas.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation and flags missing key works with bibliographic precision (e.g., HNSW).
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., the contribution paragraph's dual claim).
rationale.RX.3: The output is mostly within scope with minor drifts (e.g., the taxonomy inconsistency).
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (e.g., the ScaNN misclassification).
rationale.RX.5: The agent does not provide any annotation of sources and reasons for non-cosmetic changes.
